agent_result.summary:
## Summary
The code review found several issues with the src/checkout_pricing.py file, including the use of magic numbers and a lack of descriptive function names. The tests/test_checkout_pricing.py file should also cover more scenarios, including the bulk discount threshold.

## Performance Observations
None found.

## Edge Cases
The code does not handle edge cases well, such as the bulk discount threshold, as noted in tests/test_checkout_pricing.py.

## Security & Correctness Issues
None found.

## Architectural Suggestions
The function calc in src/checkout_pricing.py uses several magic numbers (0.925, 1.13, 42, 5) without clear explanations. The function name should be more descriptive to improve code readability.

## Validation Outcome
None found.
